TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_awas, title = awas, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/awas} }

S.FORM: (kamu nu hulam:跨步) awas manakasa i pabaw nu kakanen. .
S.PHON: (kamu nu ħur~ɾam:**) awas manakasa i pabaw nu kakanən. .

S.PHON: (kamu nu ħur~ɾam:**) awas manakasa i pabaw nu kakanən. .
